titleStmt.title: SII 34.383: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 383. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: This records the routine fixed by the body consisting of Vallavaraiyar, the trustees of the temple. of Sundarachōḻīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyiṉār and the ūravar for the temple girls to perform their daily duties of singing and the carrying of the tiru-ālatti according to their seniority (tiruchchūlam iṭṭa muṟaimai). Some six names of the incumbents are given. It is to be noted that their names end all in the suffix component māṇikkam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirubhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyan
muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu vijaiyar Abhiṣēkamum vīrar Abhiṣēkamum paṇṇi
yaruḷiya tribhuvana vīradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 vatu nāḷ 100 10 6 kūḻaikuḷattūr Uṭai
yār cuntaracōḷiśvaramuṭaiyār kōyil tēvaaṭiyār tirupāṭṭaṭaivum tiruvā
latti Eṭukkavum tirupāṭṭaṭaivum tiruccūlam Iṭṭa muṟaimaiyē vallavaraiyarum
tāṉattārum Ūravarum kūṭa I ttapaṭi mutaṟkuṭi mā
ṇikkamum tiruvampalam piriyātāṉ catturukāla māṇikkamum Iraṇṭāmuṟai yāḻviyāṉa
Aṟputakkūtta māṇikkamu pācciyāḻviyāṉa villavataraya māṇikkamum mūṉṟāmuṟai cuntara
ṇukkavaṉṟōṇi māṇikkamum Ivaḷ makaḷ kaṇavatiyāṉa kulōttuṅka cōḻa mā
mum pollāta piḷḷaiyāṉa tiruñāṉacampanta māṇikkamum
māṇikkamum nālāmuṟai valliyāṉa Irājakempira māṇikkamum pollātapiḷḷaiyā
ṉa cōḻakōṉ māṇikkamum Aiñcāmuṟai Āṭkoṇṭa nācciyāṉa vīra māṇikkamum tiru
ppaḷḷiaṟainācciyāṉa tirucciṟṟampala māṇikkamum Āṟāmuṟai Ampalaviyāḻ ṉa ca
Digital edition of SII 34.383 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
